data.name: 5 Girls, 1 Honey
data.detailed_description:
5 Girls, 1 Honey is part of our franchise! If you've played at least one of our other games, please check the community hub under "About the Franchise" for a comparison.

Playtime

~2 hours for your first run, with a hard emotional choice at the end of each day. Replay to discover every girl’s story and extend your playtime
(with fast-skip for repeated content and unlocked scenes kept between runs.) 

Gameplay 💖

As a text-based interactive fiction, the story unfolds over five chapters/days. Each day brings you closer to the girls—learning their personalities, uncovering their kinks, and diving into their deepest, most passionate desires. But there’s a catch—at the end of each day, one girl must be let go, narrowing your choices until only one remains.

With every decision, the stakes rise, intensifying the connection between you and the remaining girls. By the final day, the passion reaches its peak, leading to an intimate, unforgettable night with the one who truly captured your heart.

25 Sexy 3D Scenes

At the end of each flirt with each girl, a new, sexy 3D scene will be unlocked, with a freely adjustable camera to view the girl from any and all angles. These 3D scenes reveal more of each girl's personality, from seductive poses to playful gestures.

Replayability

Even after finishing the game, it is possible to replay it from the start, unlocking further dialogue options with other girls. Each playthrough allows you to end up with another girl, eventually unlocking all animated 3D scenes and sex scenes.

The Girls

🧛 Komori – The Punk Vampire Girl

A rebellious lead singer who lives for the thrill… but doesn’t drink blood. Her band’s gothic style and eerie charm are impossible to ignore. You can also meet her at the Café Maid - Hentai Editon

🧟 Kemuriko – The Cheerful Undead Girl

Bubbly, curious, and full of life—despite being undead. Having lost her memories, she now seeks new experiences to discover who she truly is

You can meet her again in our next game Voyeur Villa: Living With Monster Girls

👼 Sora – The Soaring Angel Girl

A sweet girl with a secret mission, naturally drawn to the player.

You can also meet her at the Kinky Cosplay Heroes

💪 Ryoko – The Tomboy

The Gym Muscle Girl The strongest of the girls, Ryoko is a true tomboy, dedicated to pushing her physical limits in the gym.
You can also meet her at the Voyeur Villa

🌸 Jochu – The Pleaser

A hardworking, cheerful girl who takes pride in doing her best and always seeks to please.
You can also meet her at the Café Maid - Hentai Edition

Sexuality

Most interactions are heterosexual, with one or two scenes featuring a threesome.

Make your choices, build your connections, and decide who truly captures your heart. With 25 sexy 3D scenes and multiple endings, every playthrough can reveal something new.

Will you uncover their secrets...?

data.short_description: 💖 Flirt with stunning girls in this interactive text-based interactive fiction, including a seductive vampire punk, a semen-hungry zombie girl, and a sweet soaring angel. Uncover their secrets, choose your favorite, and unlock steamy 3D scenes.

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10
  • 處理器: INTEL® Pentium Dual Core G3250
  • 記憶體: 8 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Any with dx11 support
  • DirectX: 版本：11
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: DirectX9c compliant

pc_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • OS: Windows 10
  • Processor: INTEL® Pentium Dual Core G3250
  • Memory: 8 MB RAM
  • Graphics: Any with dx11 support
  • DirectX: Version 11
  • Storage: 2 GB available space
  • Sound Card: DirectX9c compliant
